quiz.question:
White offers a rook trade with Rf3.

Should Black accept the trade?

answers.text: No. The resulting king and pawn endgame would be lost for Black.

feedback.text: That's right! White is up two pawns so the king & pawn endgame is certainly lost for Black. Black has good drawing chances with the rooks on the board.

distractors.text: Yes. After the rook trade Black has time to walk over with the king & win White's c/b pawns.

feedback.text: That's not quite right. Black can get to the pawns, but White's passed f-pawn will quickly roll down the board.
